APPROVE
Flag, config key, and conditional registration are wired correctly: anchor_edit and store-backed ReadTool appear iff --anchors or cfg.Anchors is set; BuiltinToolsForPreset no longer auto-registers anchor_edit (proper gating); tests cover both states.
